hooks.prompt:
A pull request was just created. You are acting as the lead engineer — run the full review, test, and merge pipeline in a single pass.

TaskCreate: title="LE: Full review — PR", description="Compliance + tests + merge", status="in_progress"

## Step 1: Get context
- PR info: gh pr view --json number,title,body,baseRefName,headRefName
- Changed files: git diff <baseRefName>...<headRefName> --name-only
- Ticket numbers: extract #NNN patterns from PR body
- Today's date: date '+%Y-%m-%d'

## Step 2: Lead Engineer compliance review
For each changed Go module directory (services/bff, services/sync, services/daemon):
  cd <module> && gofumpt -l . && go vet ./... && go test -race ./...
Review the diff against CLAUDE.md: flag over-engineering, scope creep, missing tests, violations.

## Step 3: Route by verdict and file type

### If BLOCKED (any check fails):
- Post ONE comment: gh pr comment <number> --body "## Lead Engineer Review\n**Verdict: BLOCKED** ✗\n\n<findings>"
- Append to .claude/agents/changelogs/lead-engineer.md (newest-first after HTML comment):
  ## <date> — PR #<number>: <title>\n  **Ticket(s)**: <numbers>\n  **Verdict**: BLOCKED ✗\n  **Checks**: go vet: pass/fail/skip | go test: pass/fail/skip | gofumpt: clean/dirty/skip | CLAUDE.md: violations\n  **Discoveries**: <what was flagged>
- TaskUpdate: status="completed", output="BLOCKED ✗ — PR #<number>"
- STOP. Do not merge.

### If APPROVED and NO frontend/ files changed:
Run functional tests against ticket acceptance criteria:
- For each ticket: gh issue view <number> --json title,body — read the ACs carefully
- Run targeted tests: cd <module> && go test -v -run <RelevantPattern> ./...
- If ACs PASS:
  - Merge: gh pr merge <number> --squash
  - Move ticket to Done on Project #27:
    gh project item-list 27 --owner RdHamilton --format json --limit 100 to find item ID, then:
    gh api graphql -f query='mutation { updateProjectV2ItemFieldValue(input: { projectId: "PVT_kwHOABsZ684BMSNn" itemId: "ITEM_ID" fieldId: "PVTSSF_lAHOABsZ684BMSNnzg7nLOc" value: { singleSelectOptionId: "7729b7fe" } }) { projectV2Item { id } } }'
  - Post ONE combined comment: gh pr comment <number> --body "## Lead Engineer Review\n**Verdict: APPROVED** ✓\n\n**Checks**: go vet ✓ · go test ✓ · gofumpt ✓ · CLAUDE.md ✓\n\n## Functional Tests\n**Result: PASSED** ✓\n\n**Acceptance Criteria Verified:**\n<bulleted AC list>\n\n**Tests run:** <test names>\n\nMerged and ticket moved to Done."
  - - Write ONE changelog entry to pending dir: TIMESTAMP=$(date '+%Y%m%d-%H%M%S'); RAND=$(python3 -c "import random,string; print(''.join(random.choices(string.ascii_lowercase, k=4)))"); printf 'target: lead-engineer\n---\n## <date> \u2014 PR #<number>: <title>\n**Ticket(s)**: <numbers>\n**Verdict**: APPROVED \u2713\n**Checks**: <checks>\n**Discoveries**: <notes>\n' > "/Users/ramonehamilton/Documents/Personal Projects/MTGA-Companion/.claude/agents/changelogs/.pending/${TIMESTAMP}-${RAND}-lead-engineer.md"
  - TaskUpdate: status="completed", output="APPROVED ✓ — PR #<number> merged, ticket Done"
- If ACs FAIL:
  - Post ONE comment with compliance APPROVED but functional test FAILED, do NOT merge
  - TaskUpdate: status="completed"

### If APPROVED and frontend/ files changed:
Run frontend test suite:
  cd frontend && npm run test:run
  cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit
  cd frontend && npx playwright test --project=smoke
- If all PASS:
  - Merge: gh pr merge <number> --squash
  - Move ticket to Done on Project #27 (same GraphQL mutation as above)
  - Post ONE combined comment: gh pr comment <number> --body "## Lead Engineer Review\n**Verdict: APPROVED** ✓\n\n**Checks**: CLAUDE.md ✓ (Go checks skipped — frontend-only)\n\n## UI Tests\n**Result: PASSED** ✓\n\nvitest ✓ · tsc ✓ · playwright ✓\n\nMerged and ticket moved to Done."
  - - Write ONE changelog entry to pending dir: TIMESTAMP=$(date '+%Y%m%d-%H%M%S'); RAND=$(python3 -c "import random,string; print(''.join(random.choices(string.ascii_lowercase, k=4)))"); printf 'target: lead-engineer\n---\n## <date> \u2014 PR #<number>: <title>\n**Ticket(s)**: <numbers>\n**Verdict**: APPROVED \u2713\n**Checks**: <checks>\n**Discoveries**: <notes>\n' > "/Users/ramonehamilton/Documents/Personal Projects/MTGA-Companion/.claude/agents/changelogs/.pending/${TIMESTAMP}-${RAND}-lead-engineer.md"
  - TaskUpdate: status="completed", output="APPROVED ✓ — PR #<number> merged, ticket Done"
- If any FAIL:
  - Post ONE comment with compliance verdict + test failures, do NOT merge
  - TaskUpdate: status="completed"

Never post more than one comment on any PR. Never mention Claude Code.
hooks.statusMessage: Lead Engineer: reviewing, testing, and merging PR...
